message:
feat(web): add OpenGraph images for bundles and workflows pages

- Add opengraph-image.tsx for bundles index page (shows bundle count)
- Add opengraph-image.tsx for workflows page with purple gradient theme
- Add layout.tsx for workflows with proper metadata including OG tags
- Enhance bundles page metadata with full OpenGraph and Twitter card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; +import { bundles } from "@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/bundles"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; +export const alt = "Prompt Bundles - Curated collections for agentic coding"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 630, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default function BundlesOpenGraphImage() { + const bundleCount = bundles.length; + const totalPrompts = bundles.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.promptIds.length, 0); + + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+
+ Jeffrey's Prompts +
+ +
+
+ Prompt Bundles +
+
+ Curated collections of related prompts. Install all prompts in a bundle with a single command. +
+
+ +
+ {bundleCount} bundles + · + {totalPrompts} prompts + jeffreysprompts.com +
+
+ ), + size + ); +}

@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; +import { workflows } from "@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; +export const alt = "Workflow Builder - Chain prompts into powerful workflows"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 630, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default function WorkflowsOpenGraphImage() { + const workflowCount = workflows.length; + + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+
+ Jeffrey's Prompts +
+ +
+
+ Workflow Builder +
+
+ Chain prompts together into powerful multi-step workflows. Export as markdown for any AI assistant. +
+
+ +
+ {workflowCount} curated workflows + jeffreysprompts.com +
+
+ ), + size + ); +}
